name: Linear-Inspired Video Skin
description: Clean, modern video player skin inspired by Linear's design system

classes.container: relative w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-zinc-950 shadow-lg
classes.controlsBar: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 bg-zinc-900/95 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-zinc-800
classes.playButton: flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-lg hover:bg-violet-500/10 transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer text-zinc-200 hover:text-violet-400
classes.timeline: flex-1 h-1.5 bg-zinc-700/20 rounded-full cursor-pointer relative hover:h-2 transition-all duration-200
classes.timelineProgress: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-violet-500 rounded-full pointer-events-none transition-all duration-100
classes.timelineBuffered: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-zinc-600/40 rounded-full pointer-events-none
classes.fullscreenButton: flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-lg hover:bg-violet-500/10 transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer text-zinc-200 hover:text-violet-400
classes.settingsButton: flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-lg hover:bg-violet-500/10 transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer text-zinc-200 hover:text-violet-400
classes.loadingSpinner: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-sm
classes.playOverlay: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-zinc-950/40 cursor-pointer hover:bg-zinc-950/50 transition-all duration-200 group
classes.playOverlayButton: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-violet-500/90 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-200
